title: The Mother the Son the Rat and the Gun
original_title: The Mother the Son The Rat and The Gun
overview: Gun-toting gangsters, lawless lawyers and backstabbing bastards. There's a family in the middle, and while some are trying to keep it afloat, others want to tear it apart.
